name: Sugar-Free Chocolate Fudge
recipeIngredient: 2 oz Unsweetened chocolate square (melted and cooled)
24 Packets Aspartame sweetener (equivalent to 1/2 cup sugar)
recipeInstructions:
In a small mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese, melted chocolate, aspartame sweetener, and vanilla until smooth. Stir in the pecans. Pour into an 8-inch square baking pan lined with foil. Cover and refrigerate overnight. Cut into 16 squares.
Diabetic exchanges: one square equals one serving of 3 fats. 147 calories, 84 mg of sodium, 31 mg cholesterol, 5 gm carbohydrates, 3 gm protein, 14 gm fat.
